gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6/193)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6/193)
text: هُ كَانَ يَتَصَدَّقُ بِالسُّكَّرِ فَقِيلَ لَهُ أَ تَتَصَدَّقُ بِالسُّكَّرِ فَقَالَ نَعَمْ إِنَّهُ لَيْسَ شَيْ‏ءٌ أَحَبَّ إِلَيَّ مِنْهُ فَأَنَا أُحِبُّ أَنْ أَتَصَدَّقَ بِأَحَبِّ الْأَشْيَاءِ إِلَيَّ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Abu Abdullah, from Muhammad Bin Shuayb, from Al Husayn Bin Al Hassan, from Aasim, from Yunus, from the one who mentioned it,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> that he<sup>asws</sup> used to give charity with the sugar, so it was said to him<sup>asws</sup>, ‘You<sup>asws</sup> are giving charity with the sugar?’ So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Yes, there is nothing more beloved to me<sup>asws</sup> than it, therefore I<sup>asws</sup> loved it that I<sup>asws</sup> should give charity with the thing most beloved to me<sup>asws</sup>’.
en.sarwar: 3. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn abu ‘Abd Allah from Muhammad ibn Shu’ayb from al-Husayn ibn al-Hassan from ‘Asem from Yunus from those whom he has mentioned who has said the following: ”Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, was seen giving sugar for charity. Someone asked, ‘Do you give sugar for charity?’ He (Imam) replied, ‘Yes, there is not anything more beloved to me than sugar, so I love to give for charity what is most beloved to me.’”
